texto: Grace knocks us flat, preventing any form of self-congratulation. All the good we achieve is to be attributed to God rather than to ourselves. What makes our lives good is not anything we are ourselves but the presence within us of what we are not, a divine presence never ours by right because never ours by nature. All the glory for the good we exhibit in our lives should therefore be reserved for God.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kathryn Tanner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Grace knocks us flat, preventing any form of self-congratulation. All the good we achieve is to b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, grace, ourselves, útil em momentos de reflexao.
